title: Milk Frother Electric 4 in 1 - Automatic Milk Frothers and Milk Steamer 400ML,Warm and Cold Foam Maker for Coffee, Latte, Cappuccino, Macchiato, Hot Chocolate,Ideal for Home & Office Use
features: 【400 ML large capacity milk frother】 This milk steamer and milk frother has a capacity of 300 ml, sufficient to meet daily needs. The maximum milk capacity for making milk foam is 100 ml, and the minimum is 50 ml. The maximum milk capacity for heating milk or hot chocolate is 250 ml. Note: Each mode has a suitable capacity. When pouring milk, please be careful not to exceed the maximum mark for each mode to avoid overflowing.

【4-in-1 Milk Frother】 The electric milk frother includes four different settings, allowing for hot milk foam, hot chocolate, hot milk, and room temperature milk foam, making it ideal for making lattes, cappuccinos, and other drinks based on espresso. With one-button operation, this coffee frother is both simple and easy to use, as well as efficient.

【 Warm and user-friendly design 】 The electric milk frother is completely made of stainless steel. It feels very sturdy to the touch. The milk frother adopts food grade double-layer insulation wall, which is durable and safe. The texture design that conforms to ergonomics is not only easy to grip, but also more sturdy and not easily damaged.

【Auto Shut-Off & Highly Reliable】 Milk foamer features Strix temperature control to ensure that it will automatically close after the production of milk or foam. This can effectively prevent the burning of milk or excessive foam, and ensure the safety of operation. This milk frother runs quietly, and can produce perfect milk foam in only 2-3 minutes. (Note: When using the hot milk function, please remove the metal coil from the milk frother)

【Easy to Clean】This milk foamer features an ABS housing, its interior uses a non-stick coated stainless steel, and includes a cleaning brush. The accompanying detachable mixer can be ejected for thorough cleaning, and the entire device only needs to be quickly rinsed for cleaning. The bottom and exterior should not come into contact with water. When cleaning the exterior, please wipe it with a damp towel.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Can rotate 360 degrees, easy to use, Intelligent temperature control system, automatic power-off insulation/prevent dry burning, Magnetic levitation foaming technology, precise temperature control at 65 ℃, This machine cannot be cleaned with a dishwasher
